EmailTemplate.name: Questionnaire Recall English Steel
EmailTemplate.subject: Interpipe Steel Survey
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
< https://interpipe.biz/en/ >
{{{Questionnaire_Response__c.Salutation__c}}} {{{Questionnaire_Response__c.Respondent__c}}},
We have noticed that you haven’t filled out our Customer Satisfaction Survey yet. So this is a kind reminder as your responses are extremely important for us to improve and serve you better.
Please simply follow the link below. The survey should take up to 10 minutes of your time.
In case you have any questions or troubles with the survey, please contact me in response to this email or by phone.
Respectfully,
Yuliya Kozachenko
________________
Head of Marketing
Interpipe | Interpipe Steel
yuliya.kozachenko@m.interpipe.biz
+38 (056) 7474 797
Take Survey < https://interpipe.my.site.com/NewCustomerRoom/s/survey?recordId=%7B%7B%7BQuestionnaire_Response__c.Id%7D%7D%7D+ > < https://zadnipro.dp.ua/en >
